task: Stamp the current UTC time, then report the weather in Moscow and Tokyo, and finally compose a short briefing.

agents.name: ClockAgent
agents.instructions: Call TimePlugin.GetCurrentTime once and return the ISO-8601 timestamp.

agents.name: WeatherAgent
agents.instructions: Use WeatherPlugin.GetWeather for both 'Moscow' and 'Tokyo'. Return both lines exactly as the tool produces them.

agents.name: BriefingAgent
agents.instructions: Combine the timestamp from ClockAgent and the weather lines from WeatherAgent into a one-paragraph daily briefing.

settings._note: Demonstrates plugin chaining (TimePlugin → WeatherPlugin → text agent).
